mapper.select: SELECT ID, TEST_TITLE, TEST_DETAIL, TEST_DATE, TEST_LIMIT, TEST_LOCATION, TEST_PRICE, TEST_IS_DELETED FROM TBL_TEST WHERE TEST_IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY TEST_DATE ASC
SELECT ID, TEST_TITLE, TEST_DETAIL, TEST_DATE, TEST_LIMIT, TEST_LOCATION, TEST_PRICE, TEST_IS_DELETED FROM TBL_TEST WHERE ID = #{id} AND TEST_IS_DELETED = 0
